sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39442" key="e)piqewri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθεωρ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astrol., <sense id="n39442.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aspecting from the right</tr_>, Rhetor.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.155.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
